common.contactDescription: For any questions, contact us at:

hero.title: Rediscover music like you've never heard it before
hero.subtitle: Exclusive high-fidelity listening sessions for true audiophiles

experience.title: An unmatched sonic experience
experience.subtitle: Discover why Sound Deluxe offers an authentic audiophile experience

acoustics.title: Exceptional acoustics
acoustics.description: Acoustically treated space meeting the highest current standards

hiend.title: Hi-End equipment
hiend.description: High-fidelity equipment revealing the finest details hidden in standard systems

atmosphere.title: Minimalist atmosphere
atmosphere.description: Clean, distraction-free space for maximum attention to the music

comfort.title: Premium comfort
comfort.description: Comfortable and welcoming space for special occasions

booking.title: Book spot
booking.cancellationNote: Free cancellation up to 48h before the session.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed!
confirmation.subtitle: Thank you for your booking at Sound Deluxe
confirmation.emailSent: We have sent a confirmation email to {email}
confirmation.processingNote: You will receive a confirmation email shortly

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notLoggedIn: You must log in to make a booking
errors.accountExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in to continue.
errors.selfGift: Recipient email must be different from yours

guest.title: Your details
guest.subtitle: We'll send the ticket to your email

errors.missingFields: Your name and email are required

gift.title: Gift this ticket
gift.subtitle: Buy this ticket as a gift. The recipient will receive the QR by email.
gift.messagePlaceholder: Write a message for the recipient…

errors.missingFields: Recipient name and email are required.
errors.missingBuyerFields: Your name and email are required.

albums.title: Classic Vinyl Store
albums.subtitle: Discover our collection of iconic vinyl records
albums.noResults: No albums found with these filters

loginPrompt.voteMessage: You need an account to vote. Sign up for free and pick your favorite albums.

votes.title: Vote for your favorite albums
votes.subtitle: Help us decide which albums to schedule for future sessions
votes.infoText: You can only vote for albums that don't have scheduled sessions yet. The most voted albums will be considered for future programming. You need to be registered to vote.
votes.noVotesYet: No votes yet. Be the first to vote!

suggestion.title: Add an album
suggestion.subtitle: Can't find the album you want? Add it to the catalog so you can vote for it.
suggestion.noAlbums: No albums found for this artist
suggestion.success: Album added successfully! You can now vote for it.
suggestion.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
suggestion.alreadySuggested: This album already exists in the catalog.
suggestion.alreadyExistsAndVoted: This album already existed in the catalog. We've counted your vote for it.
suggestion.alreadyExistsAlreadyVoted: This album already existed in the catalog and you had already voted for it.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.noBookings: You don't have any bookings yet
profile.noVotes: You haven't voted for any albums yet
profile.noSuggestions: You haven't suggested any albums yet

salas.title: Hi-Fi Venues
salas.subtitle: Discover the spaces where we host our sessions

newsletter.title: Subscribe to our newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about new sessions and exclusive updates
newsletter.success: Thanks! Check your email to confirm your subscription.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
newsletter.privacyConsent: I agree to receive communications. I can unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter.confirmMessage: You will now receive our updates in your inbox.
newsletter.confirmError: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
newsletter.confirmExpired: The link has expired. Please subscribe again.
newsletter.unsubscribeMessage: You will no longer receive our emails.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Sound Deluxe we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data.

dataCollected.title: Data we collect
dataCollected.email: Email address: To send you the newsletter and communications
dataCollected.language: Preferred language: To send you content in your language
dataCollected.consent: Consent record: Date, time and IP of subscription

purpose.title: Purpose of processing
purpose.newsletter: Send you information about new listening sessions

unsubscribe.title: How to unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: You can unsubscribe at any time:
unsubscribe.emailLink: By clicking the unsubscribe link in any email
unsubscribe.profile: From your user profile if you are registered

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For any questions about your data, contact us at:

retention.title: Data retention
retention.description: We keep your data while the subscription is active. If you unsubscribe, we keep a minimal record to comply with current legislation.

profilePreferences.newsletterLabel: Receive newsletter with news and sessions
profilePreferences.showInPublicListsEnabled: Your name will be visible in votes, comments and social network
profilePreferences.showInPublicListsDisabled: Your name will not appear in public lists

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our sessions and services

qr.scanAtDoor: Show this code at the entrance
